title: Beta in VR
body:
# Beta in VR
**Do you wish you could play Beta in VR? Well wish no more! Beta in VR replicates Beta 1.7.3 with Nostalgic Tweaks and other mods with Vivecraft to create the experience you always wanted!**

Features:
- VR Support, of course
- No Hunger
- No Sprinting
- Old textures thanks to the Golden Days Resource Pack
- Beta 1.7.3 Terrain
- Optimization Mods built-in
- You cannot beat the game
- Almost all Structures are gone
- And More!

**Note:**
You can play this Modpack without VR, but things like ImmersiveMC will make your Survival Experience feel different then Beta 1.7.3. If you dont want this, either delete the mods from your Instances mod folder or get a different Modpack.

## QuestCraft Users! Please read:
To play this Modpack, you need to do some extra setup. Steps are located [here.](https://korbyntalks.github.io/BIVR/QuestCraft.txt) You may be asking: **Why cant you just release a QuestCraft version?** Well, I did but it was not working properly unfortunately, so I had to resort to tell the user on what to do.
